It also increases serum triglycerides. 74 /c82Drink enough of safe and wholesome water to meet daily fluid requirements. /c82Drink boiled water, when safety of the water is in doubt. /c82Consume at least 250 ml of boiled or pasteurized milk per day. /c82Drink natural and fresh fruit juices instead of carbonated beverages. /c82Prefer tea over coffee. /c82Avoid alcohol. Those who drink should limit its intake. POINTS TO PONDER 75 Guideline 14 What are processed foods? Do we need processed foods? Minimize the use of processed foods rich in salt, sugar and fats Rationale: /c63Urbanization has increased the intake and demand for processed foods. /c63There is a trend towards replacing traditionally cooked foods with processed foods.
